is.one_liner: Onchain event indexer across 6 chains (Berachain primary) — source of truth for THJ holdings + events
scope: Index contract events across 6 chains (Ethereum, Optimism, Arbitrum, Base, Berachain, Zora)
Serve indexed holdings + events via GraphQL (HyperIndex V3)
Act as single source of truth for CubQuests, score-api, ApiologyDAO, and Mibera substrate

is_not: Does NOT run a chain or validate blocks — it indexes external chain events
Will NOT host NFT metadata or media — that is storage-api
Does NOT compute scores or rankings — that is score-api
_comment: composes_with + acvp_invariants omitted pending port-schema sealing (ADR-007 App A.2 / ADR-008 §D-11); relationships are documented in README. Add when buildings seal TagName@semver+hash tags. The mcp transport block is added at deployment.
